title: afzelia deflexa
intro: Afzelia deflexa, also known as the black beech tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Afzelia deflexa include its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the bark and seeds of Afzelia deflexa are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
